news.t: VanEck Announces Year-End Distributions for VanEck Equity ETFs
VanEck Announces Change to ETF Product Line
VanEck Announces Yearend Distributions for VanEck Equity ETFs

holdings.infoBox: EVX is an equity ETF with a total of 27 individual holdings. The top holdings are Ecolab stock at 7.86%, Waste Management at 7.38%, NGK Corporation at 6.68%, Waste Connections at 6.59%, and Veolia Environnement at 6.58%.

overview.description: The VanEck Environmental Services ETF (EVX) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in stocks based on a particular theme. The fund tracks a market cap-weighted index of companies from around the world that gain revenues from environmental services across different industries. EVX was launched on Oct 10, 2006 and is issued by VanEck.

data.title: VanEck Announces Year-End Distributions for VanEck Equity ETFs
data.text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--VanEck announced today the 2025 annual distributions per share for its VanEck equity exchange-traded funds.

data.title: VanEck Announces Change to ETF Product Line
data.text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--VanEck announces 5-for-1 forward stock split for its EVX ETF.

data.title: VanEck Announces Yearend Distributions for VanEck Equity ETFs
data.text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--VanEck announced today the following 2022 annual distributions per share for its VanEck® equity exchange-traded funds.
